/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/cloudisk_server.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cloudisk_server.dir/src/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cloudisk_server.dir/src/client_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cloudisk_server.dir/src/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cloudisk_server.dir/src/thread_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cloudisk_server.dir/src/database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cloudisk_server.dir/src/user_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cloudisk_server.dir/src/file_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cloudisk_server.dir/src/http_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cloudisk_server.dir/src/session_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cloudisk_server.dir/src/json_helper.cpp.o -o cloudisk_server  -lmysqlclient /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -luuid -lstdc++fs
